= parse_logfmt

Parses logfmt formatted data into an object

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root = this.msg.parse_logfmt()

# In:  {"msg":"level=info msg=\"hello world\" dur=1.5s"}
# Out: {"dur":"1.5s","level":"info","msg":"hello world"}
----
